privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real-world Bologna Pasubio SUMO scenario mapped to /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio in the agent environment. The agent is strictly instructed via a generated setup briefing to configure a new charging station with 300,000 W power and 0.95 efficiency. Additionally, the bus vehicle type must be modified to have a maximum battery capacity of 150,000 and an actual starting capacity of 50,000.
